subject: fix(pwa): fix stale hasUpdate closure in checkForUpdate handlers
body:
handleCheckForUpdate in both DesktopLayout and MobileLayout read
hasUpdate after the async checkForUpdate() settle delay. But hasUpdate
is a prop captured at render time — if onNeedRefresh fires during the
1500ms settle, the closure still holds the stale pre-check value. This
caused "You're on the latest version" toast even when an update was
just detected.

Fix: toast always says "Check complete" on success. If an update was
found during the settle, the update banner/menu item appears via normal
hasUpdate prop re-render — no need to duplicate that signal in the toast.

Also fix CLAUDE.md Quick Reference: TEST_RUNNER was "Manual" but the
project now has Jest with 133 automated unit tests.
